overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a slow walk through a narrow neon-lit alleyway between towering skyscrapers. Large digital billboards advertising 'Mr. Stud' dominate the left wall while bamboo-scaffolded buildings line the right, creating a dense futuristic urban canyon atmosphere.

tall building facade with distinctive bamboo-style scaffolding and grid-patterned windows
narrow vertical gap between buildings showing distant illuminated skyscrapers against night sky
tall building covered in multiple digital screens displaying various advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow cyberpunk alleyway at night, flanked by towering buildings. On the left, a large 'Mr. Stud' digital billboard glows with warm light, while the right side features a building with intricate bamboo-style scaffolding. The camera moves forward steadily through the empty alley, with distant skyscrapers visible through the narrow gap ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley approaching close-up of billboard wall with neon signage

events.description: red neon sign reading 'GETTING CLOSER' becomes visible on the left wall between billboards

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the alley narrows, approaching the large billboard wall on the left

entered.detail: vertical red neon sign with text 'GETTING CLOSER' mounted on the left building wall

segments.scene_description: As the camera advances deeper into the alley, the left wall dominates the frame with the massive 'Mr. Stud' billboard now filling the near view. A red neon sign reading 'GETTING CLOSER' becomes visible on the left wall. The bamboo-scaffolded building remains prominent on the right as the alley continues toward the distant city lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady first-person progression through a narrow, neon-lit urban canyon that emphasizes the oppressive scale of a futuristic city. It begins deep within a dark alleyway, where the camera moves forward between towering structures under a night sky. As the movement continues, the warm glow of a large Mr. Stud digital billboard dominates the left side, contrasting with the intricate bamboo-style scaffolding of the building on the right. The scene then opens up slightly as the camera advances, revealing the silhouettes of distant skyscrapers through the narrow gap ahead.

The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a claustrophobic urban canyon that becomes increasingly dominated by aggressive neon advertising. It begins by advancing deeper into the narrow alley, where the towering bamboo-scaffolded buildings on the right maintain a steady presence. As the camera pushes forward, the massive Mr. Stud billboard on the left expands to fill the near view, overwhelming the frame with its scale. The scene then shifts focus as a red neon sign reading GETTING CLOSER emerges from the shadows of the left wall, guiding the perspective further toward the distant, shimmering city lights.
